title: pelargonium albidum
intro: Pelargonium albidum, also known as the White Storksbill or White Geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, making it a valuable resource for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Pelargonium albidum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, among others. Herbal preparations of Pelargonium albidum are often made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
